entities.girl: a girl looking at the remains
entities.puddle: a melted snowman (scarf, carrot, stones in a puddle)

scenes.title: The Melted Snowman
scenes.background_prompt: A front yard with a patchy lawn showing both snow and grass, a picket fence, a mailbox, and a driveway. Mild late-winter day. No people, no snowman.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A front yard on a mild late-winter day. The lawn is patchy — half melted snow, half emerging green grass. In the center of the yard, where a snowman once stood, only remnants remain: a wet puddle on flattened grass, a soggy red scarf lying in a coil, a carrot nose resting on its side in the mud, two coal-stone eyes sitting in the puddle, and three dark buttons in a line. The snowman has clearly melted over recent warm days. A girl of about seven in a purple winter coat and rubber boots stands beside the remains, looking down with a wistful, sad expression, her hands hanging at her sides. A white picket fence borders the yard. A mailbox with the flag up stands at the end of the driveway. A few patches of old dirty snow cling to the shaded side of the fence.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place girl standing beside a wet puddle on the lawn (center), looking down with wistful expression, hands at sides. Place puddle with remnants: a soggy red scarf in a coil, a carrot on its side, two coal-stone eyes, three dark buttons in a line.
